expectations.text: Restates the problem before proposing anything
expectations.evidence: No restatement — jumps to 'это классический silent failure. Мне нужно посмотреть код'

expectations.text: Asks at least one clarifying question before offering fixes
expectations.evidence: Asks for stack and handler file — but also dumps 6 possible causes simultaneously

expectations.text: Does NOT propose a concrete fix/command in the first response
expectations.evidence: Lists 6 specific fix directions without investigating first

expectations.text: Separates symptom from possible root causes
expectations.evidence: No explicit separation — goes straight to listing causes

expectations.text: Asks ONE question at a time (not a barrage of 3+)
expectations.evidence: Asks 2 questions plus dumps 6 possible causes
